title: Dashboard loads all widgets successfully for an Admin user
precondition: User is logged in as 'admin.user@acmetest.com' with Admin role.
Project 'Web Regression Suite' contains dashboard data.
Dashboard service and backend APIs are available.
steps: Wait until the page finishes loading.
Verify that the Test Run Summary widget is displayed.
Verify that the Recent Activity widget is displayed.
Verify that the Pass Rate Trend chart is displayed.
Verify that the filter panel is displayed with Project, Time Period and Status filters.
expected result: All dashboard widgets load successfully without errors or empty placeholders. No widget displays a loading indicator after the page has finished loading.

title: Test Run Summary widget displays correct Pass/Fail/Blocked counts
precondition: Project 'Web Regression Suite' contains the following test results:
steps: Observe the Test Run Summary widget.
expected result: The widget displays Passed = 145, Failed = 12 and Blocked = 8, matching the backend values.

title: Recent Activity feed displays the latest activities in descending order
precondition: Recent backend activities exist with timestamps.
Latest activity is 'Test Run #542 completed' at 10:35 AM.
steps: Review the first five activity entries.
Compare the displayed timestamps with backend records.
expected result: Activities are displayed in descending timestamp order. The newest activity ('Test Run #542 completed') appears first and all displayed activities match backend data.

title: Pass Rate Trend chart displays accurate values from backend
precondition: Backend contains weekly pass rates for the last four weeks:
steps: Observe the Pass Rate Trend chart.
expected result: The chart displays pass rates of 91%, 93%, 95% and 92% for the corresponding weeks. Tooltip values match backend values.

title: Project filter updates all dashboard widgets
precondition: User has access to projects 'Web Regression Suite' and 'Mobile Automation'.
steps: Observe the Test Run Summary widget.
Observe the Pass Rate Trend chart.
expected result: All dashboard widgets refresh and display only data belonging to the 'Mobile Automation' project.

title: Time Period filter refreshes dashboard data correctly
precondition: Dashboard contains historical data for multiple time periods.
expected result: Dashboard widgets refresh automatically and display data only for the selected time period.

title: Status filter displays only selected execution status
precondition: Dashboard contains Passed, Failed and Blocked test executions.
steps: Observe the Test Run Summary widget.
expected result: Only failed execution data is displayed. Passed and Blocked results are excluded from the dashboard widgets where applicable.

title: Dashboard layout is responsive on Desktop viewport (1920×1080)
steps: Verify the arrangement of all widgets.
Resize the browser within desktop dimensions.
expected result: Widgets remain aligned without overlap or truncation. Charts and tables are fully visible and usable.

title: Dashboard layout is responsive on Tablet viewport (768×1024)
expected result: Widgets are rearranged appropriately for tablet view. No horizontal scrolling is required and all controls remain usable.

title: Dashboard layout is responsive on Mobile viewport (390×844)
steps: Verify widgets are displayed in a single-column layout.
Interact with the Pass Rate Trend chart.
expected result: Dashboard is fully usable on mobile devices. Widgets stack vertically, no content overlaps, filters are accessible and charts remain readable.

title: Viewer role cannot access Admin-only dashboard widgets
precondition: Pass Rate Trend chart is configured as Admin-only.
expected result: The Viewer can see only permitted widgets (e.g., Test Run Summary and Recent Activity). Admin-only widgets such as the Pass Rate Trend chart are hidden or inaccessible.

title: Admin role can access all dashboard widgets
steps: Verify all dashboard widgets are displayed.
expected result: Admin user can view the Test Run Summary, Recent Activity, Pass Rate Trend chart and all dashboard filters without restrictions.
